hist: interjection. An utterance used to discreetly attract someone's attention.
light: noun. Electromagnetic radiation in the wavelength range visible to the human eye (about 400–750 nanometers): visible light.
lilt: verb. To do something rhythmically, with animation and quickness, usually of music.

sly: adjective. Artfully cunning; secretly mischievous; wily.

thy: determiner. Possessive form of thou: that which belongs to thee; which belongs to you.
